name: ND Metadata
description: Multi-language text metadata agent supporting Last.fm, Wikipedia, Genius, Apple Music, Deezer and Discogs with configurable source priority, auto-translation and refresh controls.
author: Antigravity

http.reason: Fetch text metadata and translate missing descriptions

source_priority.title: Orden de Prioridad de Fuentes (Source Priority)
source_priority.description: Lista de fuentes separadas por coma en orden de preferencia (ej. 'lastfm,wikipedia,genius,applemusic,deezer,discogs' o 'wikipedia,lastfm,genius').

target_language.title: Target Language Codes
target_language.description: Preferred language codes tried in order (e.g., 'es', 'es,mx,us', 'en,us,gb', 'pt,br')

enable_auto_translate.title: Enable Automatic Translation
enable_auto_translate.description: Automatically translate biographies to preferred language if no native biography is available

refresh_interval_days.title: Artist Bio Refresh Interval (Days)
refresh_interval_days.description: Days before refreshing artist info. Set to 0 to ALWAYS fetch fresh info when adding an album or querying.
